stories.title: Balogun makes this USMNT side better, including it...
stories.summary: Friday's 4-1 blowout of Paraguay showed that the U.S. men's national team has its star. What if it now has its scorer, too?

stories.title: USMNT player ratings: Balogun, Pulisic team-best p...
stories.summary: In the USMNT's World Cup-opening win, Folarin Balogun, Christian Pulisic share spotlight as team's best players.

stories.title: Balogun living WC 'dream' as U.S. choice pays off
stories.summary: USMNT striker Folarin Balogun, who could have played for England or Nigeria, said his two goals in Friday's 4-1 World Cup victory over Paraguay made for a "dreamy night."

stories.title: Pulisic subbed off at halftime, 'hoping it's nothi...
stories.summary: United States winger Christian Pulisic was substituted at halftime of his team's World Cup opener against Paraguay on Friday, with the Americans leading 3-0 at the break.

stories.title: Dempsey slams Marsch over anthem: Stay in lane
stories.summary: United States legend Clint Dempsey had some choice words for former national team assistant Jesse Marsch, who suggested Thursday that some American players needed encouragement to sing the anthem ahead of games.
